name: Sample TPN Configuration
description: Test configuration with common TPN ingredients

ACETATE.NOTES:
Acetate Information

Acetate is used to help maintain acid-base balance in TPN solutions.

[f(var total = me.getValue("acetateTotal"); return total > 0 ? "Acetate present: " + total + " mmol" : "No acetate detected";)]

CALCIUM.NOTES:
Calcium dosing information:

Essential mineral for bone health and cellular function.

[f(var calcium = me.getValue("calciumAmount"); return "Calcium dose: " + me.maxP(calcium, 1) + " mg";)]

DEXTROSE.NOTES:
Carbohydrate Source

Primary energy source in TPN providing glucose for cellular metabolism.

[f(var glucose = me.getValue("dextroseRate"); return glucose > 0 ? "Glucose rate: " + glucose + " mg/kg/min" : "No dextrose";)]

AMINOACIDS.NOTES:
Protein Source

Essential and non-essential amino acids for protein synthesis.

[f(var protein = me.getValue("proteinAmount"); return "Protein: " + me.maxP(protein, 0.5) + " g/kg/day";)]

LIPIDS.NOTES:
Fat Source

Essential fatty acids and concentrated energy source.

[f(var fat = me.getValue("lipidAmount"); return "Fat: " + me.maxP(fat, 1) + " g/kg/day";)]
